name: E-12 per-rule per-file cache: --cache-strategy metadata keys on mtime+size (not the file SHA) so byte-identical re-touches still hit
command: printf 'x\n' > in.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/run-detector.sh" --rule g-ts-001 --in in.txt --cache --cache-location cache.json --cache-strategy metadata --cache-stats 2>err.txt; grep -q '"cache_strategy":"metadata"' err.txt && echo metadata_strategy 1>&2
